User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Sitemap
Sitemap: https://atushome.com/sitemap.xml

# Disallow admin routes
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /login
Disallow: /register
Disallow: /profile
Disallow: /orders
Disallow: /settings
Disallow: /cart
Disallow: /checkout

# Allow product and category pages
Allow: /product/
Allow: /products
Allow: /campaigns
Allow: /new-arrivals
Allow: /bestsellers
Allow: /about
Allow: /contact
Allow: /faq
Allow: /help
